actualTrack.description: The actual track information of the arriving transit vehicle.

arrivalEnabled.description: Indicates if riders can arrive on this transit vehicle.

blockTripSequence.description: Index of this arrival’s trip into the sequence of trips for the active block.

departureEnabled.description: Indicates if riders can depart from this transit vehicle.

distanceFromStop.description: Distance of the arriving transit vehicle from the stop, in meters.

frequency.description: Information about frequency-based scheduling, if applicable to the trip.

historicalOccupancy.description: Historical occupancy information of the transit vehicle.

lastUpdateTime.description: Timestamp of the last update time for this arrival.

numberOfStopsAway.description: Number of stops between the arriving transit vehicle and the current stop (excluding the current stop).

occupancyStatus.description: Current occupancy status of the transit vehicle.

predicted.description: Indicates if real-time arrival info is available for this trip.

predictedArrivalInterval.description: Interval for predicted arrival time, if available.

predictedArrivalTime.description: Predicted arrival time, in milliseconds since Unix epoch (zero if no real-time available).

predictedDepartureInterval.description: Interval for predicted departure time, if available.

predictedDepartureTime.description: Predicted departure time, in milliseconds since Unix epoch (zero if no real-time available).

predictedOccupancy.description: Predicted occupancy status of the transit vehicle.

routeId.description: The ID of the route for the arriving vehicle.

routeLongName.description: Optional route long name that potentially overrides the route long name in the referenced route element.

routeShortName.description: Optional route short name that potentially overrides the route short name in the referenced route element.

scheduledArrivalTime.description: Scheduled arrival time, in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

scheduledDepartureTime.description: Scheduled departure time, in milliseconds since Unix epoch.

scheduledTrack.description: Scheduled track information of the arriving transit vehicle.

serviceDate.description: Time, in milliseconds since the Unix epoch, of midnight for the start of the service date for the trip.

situationIds.description: References to situation elements (if any) applicable to this arrival.

stopId.description: The ID of the stop the vehicle is arriving at.

stopSequence.description: Index of the stop into the sequence of stops that make up the trip for this arrival.

totalStopsInTrip.description: Total number of stops visited on the trip for this arrival.

tripHeadsign.description: Optional trip headsign that potentially overrides the trip headsign in the referenced trip element.

tripId.description: The ID of the trip for the arriving vehicle.

vehicleId.description: ID of the transit vehicle serving this trip.
